title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Britannia Industries Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Britannia Industries Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Britannia Industries Asia Pacific Associates are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Raipur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Britannia Industries Asia Pacific Associates:
Britannia Industries Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Kaizen

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Britannia Industries Asia Pacific Associates!
